intro: Draw to save Stickman from deadly traps and puzzles!
description:
Draw Save Puzzle is an exhilarating arcade-casual game where you can unleash your creativity and strategic thinking to save the Stickman from impending threats. 

As you draw lines to shield the Stickman from swords, bullets, and bombs, you'll not only enhance your artistic skills but also boost your brainpower and logical reasoning. 

Whether you're a puzzle aficionado or someone looking to test your creative prowess, Draw Save Puzzle offers a thrilling escape from boredom with its simple yet compelling physics system. 

Perfect for players of all ages who enjoy brain training, logic challenges, and the satisfaction of protecting a virtual character from life-threatening situations.
